svg.title: Material flow analysis - Sudostoberbayern wood supply chain
svg.desc: Professional MFA diagram showing three stages of the SOB wood supply chain with quantified flows.
svg.text: Key issue: SOB roundwood exits to Austrian mills, sawn timber returns.
Sources: LWF Bayern, AELF TS/RO/Toging, BWI 2022, BaySF, Verein "Wir bauen auf heimisches Holz e.V."
